identity: A human male tinker-mage in his 30s. Brass goggles with telescopic lenses, short sandy-brown hair, light stubble. Leather workshop apron over a waistcoat, many small tool-pockets, visible brass pocket-watch on chain, small clockwork mechanisms worn as jewelry. Bronze-and-amber color palette with faint arcane-blue rune-glow from a gadget at his chest.
outfit: Leather workshop apron over waistcoat and long-sleeved tunic. Brass goggles. Tool-belt with wrenches, springs, small gears. Brass pocket-watch on chain. Sturdy boots.
weapons: Brass hand-crossbow; clockwork grenades; pocket-watch arcane focus.
attackStyle: East-facing profile, mid-strike — firing a brass hand-crossbow at an off-screen target, one foot forward.
spellStyle: East-facing profile, channelling arcane magic — arcane-blue sparks swirl around a glowing brass pocket-watch orb held in the palm.
blockStyle: East-facing profile, arm up deploying a segmented brass shield-plate from a wrist bracer, sparks of arcane blue.
koStyle: East-facing profile, knocked-down on the ground, tools scattered around — brass gears, wrenches, loose springs.
southStyle: Full-body idle, facing camera, hands near tool-belt, goggles down.
portraitStyle: Head-and-shoulders bust, facing camera, curious clever expression, warm lamp-lit rim light, arcane-blue gadget glow at chest.
notes: M269 Tinker class — clockwork-mechanist aesthetic; brass/copper/wood/leather; NOT modern/industrial.
